title: 27% EV Failure Rate
script: 27% of compact EVs like the Tata Punch experience battery issues within 5 years. In the US, the Nissan Leaf has a 21% failure rate, while China's BYD Atto 3 has 12%. European models like the Peugeot e-208 show 18% battery degradation after 50,000 miles. Real data matters. Subscribe to Evcarix for real EV data.
